name: Chesapeake Gold Corp.
description: Chesapeake Gold Corp. is a Canadian mineral exploration and development company focused on the discovery and acquisition of major gold-silver deposits in North and South America. The company's flagship asset is the Metates project located in Durango State, Mexico, which is one of the largest undeveloped gold, silver, and zinc deposits in the world. Chesapeake is committed to developing Metates using innovative, sustainable, and cost-effective heap leach technologies.
